author: sproul
content: We need a bit more time on them, we had them passing, but the latest seed I tried uncovered more issues. It's mostly architectural issues of little practical consequence, but which will be fiddly to fix (optimisations we made that turned out to be slightly wrong but mostly harmless).

author: 0xunclebill
content:
is anyone able to pass both the transition tests and the fork tests for alpha spec 9? I'm seeing some discrepancies that prevent us from being able to pass the test

#4704 tells us that the old deposit bridge is deprecated and at the fork transition we should set

 `state.deposit_requests_start_index = state.eth1_data.deposit_count`

https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/v1.7.0-alpha.9/tests/core/pyspec/eth_consensus_specs/test/helpers/fork_transition.py#L203-L210

In the spec `upgrade_to_fulu` function doesn't set `deposit_request_start_index` (it just copies over the electra value)

https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/blob/v1.7.0-alpha.9/specs/fulu/fork.md#upgrading-the-state

if I dont update `upgrade_to_fulu` to set   `state.deposit_requests_start_index = state.eth1_data.deposit_count` i get some failures in in the transition tests

If do update `upgrade_to_fulu` I get some failures in the fork tests instead

It seems that the transition test vectors expect the value to be set, while the fork test vectors expect it copied.
